title: endernon skyblock pack
description: A 1.21 + 1.8.9 resource pack aiming to bring a dark gui to skyblock (originally from wynncraft). Because many hypixel skyblock players asked for it.
body:
A resource pack that brings a dark purple theme to Skyblock guis. Currently for 1.21 and 1.8.9.

# Current supported mods:

- NEU
- SkyHanni
- Firmament
- Skyblock-PV
- Skyblocker
- SkyOcean

please tell me what other mods you use because I seriously don't know
